rule_proof_bucket.description: One-third of 10k reference equity for tagged rule-competition only. Concurrent trades allowed within bucket if venue margin permits; cap is sum of open risk/stake in bucket, not a fixed max_open_trades count.

tuning._dataflow: Nautilus → finance_agent/btc_specialist/data → channel_training → prediction_agent/training_channel_output.json (R01). SYGNIF_PROFILE=btc_trend + Sygnif informative merge → RSI_14_1h/4h, EMA_200_1h, ADX_14 on 5m (R02). Edit thresholds here; git-tracked. See letscrash/RULE_AND_DATA_FLOW_LOOP.md §3.

r01_governance.notes: When both hold, r01_training_runner_bearish() blocks R01-style long timing and feeds stack-guard exits (see btc_strategy_0_1_engine.py).

r02_regime.notes: HTF bull gate for BTC-0.1-R02 only (entry overlay after Sygnif btc_trend_long + exit regime_break). Defaults match btc_trend_regime.py; raise to tighten.
